criteria.label: Annotate values and describe object shapes with interfaces.
Choose interface vs type and use literal unions for fixed values.
criteria.example:
```ts
interface Doc { id: string; tokens: number }   // object shape → interface
type Role = 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'    // union → type alias
type Score = number                            // alias primitive → type
```

criteria.label: Use unknown + narrowing (not any) for untrusted data.
Explain type erasure and why runtime validation is still needed.
